evals.name: portable-library-audit
evals.prompt: Audit every public skill under LIBRARY_ROOT for invocation, information hierarchy, execution, language, portability, authority, and forward evidence. Fix every blocking finding, rerun independent audits, and report one grade per skill.
evals.expected_output: Findings are evidence-backed; project policy is removed from public behavior; every step has an honest terminal state; realistic critical modes are tested; all selected skills receive an explicit grade.
